mapper.select: SELECT a.id AS announcement_id, a.title, a.content, a.is_pinned, a.created_at, a.updated_at, u.id AS created_by_user_id, u.username AS created_by_username, u.nickname AS created_by_nickname FROM announcement a JOIN user_info u ON u.id = a.created_by_user_id AND u.is_del = 0 WHERE a.target_type = #{targetType} AND a.target_id = #{targetId} AND a.is_del = 0 ORDER BY a.is_pinned DESC, a.created_at DESC
